info.name: KZ E-Commerce Platform API
info.description: Complete API collection for the KZ E-Commerce Platform — merchant admin, storefront, admin panel, and all modules.

item.name: Setup
item.description: Run these first to obtain auth tokens

request.description: Verify email with 6-digit code sent after registration
Reset password with token from forgot-password email

item.name: Admin
item.description: All endpoints require admin_token (Bearer). Protected by JwtAuthGuard + AdminGuard.

item.name: Storefront
item.description: Public browsing + customer auth. Auth endpoints are public; logout requires customer_token. Browsing endpoints are public.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Merchant payment management. Requires merchant_token. Callbacks are typically called by payment providers.

item.name: Promo Codes
item.description: Merchant promo code management. Requires merchant_token.

item.name: Subscriptions
item.description: Subscription boxes and customer subscriptions. No explicit auth guard at controller level.

item.name: Abandoned Carts
item.description: Abandoned cart recovery. No explicit auth guard at controller level.

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Merchant analytics. No explicit auth guard at controller level.
